exact_execution_focus.pending_logical_transformation: S3.1-S3.7 COMPLETED (180/180, pkg s3-a3c7d5). Next slice S3.8 — Kinetic modifiers (REQ-153): springs (directional launch), gravity zones (invert/scale gravity inside AABB), conveyors (add horizontal surface velocity to a grounded rider). These alter velocity/inertia but MUST NEVER consume the single jump — the required property test asserts jumpLock is bit-identical before/after any modifier interaction. Design: a NEW src/systems/SurfaceEffects.ts in the pipeline AFTER playerPhysics (per P3 plan canonical order: ...physics -> surfaceEffects -> sensors -> hazardsAndGoal) — reorder: put surfaceEffects between physics and sensors. Spring: on contact/overlap set playerVelocity = spring.launchVelocity (fires while overlapping; consider edge vs continuous — launch should fire on contact, likely rising-edge or while grounded-on-spring). Gravity zone: gravityScale applied to gravity — but gravity lives in PlayerPhysics; cleanest is PlayerPhysics samples an effective gravity from any gravityZone the player is inside (add a helper reading zones), OR SurfaceEffects adjusts velocity post-physics. DECIDE at plan: sampling gravity inside PlayerPhysics keeps integration correct (recommend: PlayerPhysics queries gravity zones for effective gravityY before the vy update). Conveyor: add surfaceVelocityX to a grounded rider's vx (like carry but horizontal-only, in SurfaceEffects or PlayerControl). Whichever placement, NONE may touch jumpLock. Then S3.9 verification report closes M1.

critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: confirm pkg_hash s3-a3c7d5 matches meta/project_knowledge_graph.json, npm test expect 180 passing.
IF S3.7 IS UNCOMMITTED: commit it first (git status shows HazardsAndGoal.ts, Sensors.ts, PlayerPhysics.ts, World.ts, HazardsTriggers.test.ts, meta/*). It reached done in the stage tracker.

S3.8 KINETIC MODIFIERS MUST NEVER CONSUME THE JUMP (REQ-153): springs/gravity zones/conveyors alter velocity/inertia only; the required property test asserts world.jumpLock is bit-identical before/after any modifier interaction. This is the axiom's boundary — do not let a spring reset or a gravity flip touch the lock machine.

THE AXIOM (dm-0020): the single-jump lock is engine logic in PlayerControl + WorldState.jumpLock, NEVER a schema field (dm-0011 — no maxJumps ever). Refresh happens ONLY because reload re-instantiates WorldState (dm-0018 — no reset code exists). No coyote time, no input buffering — adopting either is a P5/GDOS decision that must still consume the single jump and pass the property test.

CANONICAL PIPELINE ORDER (normative, P3 plan): lifecycle -> entityKinematics(S3.6) -> playerControl -> playerPhysics -> surfaceEffects(S3.6 ice/S3.8) -> sensors(S3.7) -> hazardsAndGoal. System composition order is a determinism parameter — the Engine must pipe systems in exactly this order; assert it when the full pipeline is assembled.

TUNING (src/components/Tuning.ts) is the single normative feel source (dm-0018): editing values invalidates replay goldens — ledgered decision only. Add fields per slice only when consumed (subtractive discipline). Current fields: gravityY, runSpeed, jumpSpeed, anticipationTicks, maxFallSpeed, playerHalfExtents.

Math whitelist in src/systems/ (dm-0017): NO transcendental functions (Math.sin/cos/tan/pow/exp/hypot banned) — only + - * / %, Math.sqrt/min/max/abs/floor/ceil/trunc. S3.6 waypoint arc-length traversal uses distance arithmetic, NOT trig. S3.9 audits by grep.

Closed-form tick-parametric kinematics (dm-0016): movers/lasers/collapse are DERIVED from tick, never incrementally integrated — exact any-tick reconstruction, reload-trivial. Only the player is integrated.

PlayerPhysics must NEVER read state.input (isolation rule; PlayerControl is the sole input consumer, by-field: moveAxis+jumpPressed in PlayerControl, resetPressed in Lifecycle). Systems pair entity def<->state by INDEX (World.ts invariant).
Golden canonical sha256 c0ec3b1f... (LevelRoundTrip) still anchored — never casually update. Schema locks dm-0009..dm-0015 all in force.
